  Property Assignment Resource. Assigns a custom property value to a service (component) or team. Use `owner_type = "TEAM"` when the owner is a team.

# opslevel_property_assignment (Resource)

Property Assignment Resource. The **owner** can be a **service** (component) or a **team**; set **owner_type** to `"TEAM"` when assigning to a team.

## Example Usage

**Service (component) property assignment (default):**

```terraform
resource "opslevel_property_assignment" "example" {
  definition = "Z2lkOi8vb3BzbGV2ZWwvUHJvcGVydGllczo6RGVmaW5pdGlvbi8xODA"
  owner      = "Z2lkOi8vb3BzbGV2ZWwvU2VydmljZS85MTQyOQ"
  value      = jsonencode("green")
}
```

**Team property assignment:**

```terraform
resource "opslevel_team" "platform" {
  name             = "platform"
  responsibilities = "Platform team"
}

resource "opslevel_property_assignment" "platform_slack" {
  definition  = opslevel_property_definition.team_slack.id
  owner       = opslevel_team.platform.alias
  owner_type  = "TEAM"
  value       = jsonencode("#platform-team")
}
```

## Schema

### Required

- `definition` (String) The custom property definition's ID or alias.
- `owner` (String) The ID or alias of the entity (service or team) that the property has been assigned to.

### Optional

- `owner_type` (String) The type of the entity: `"COMPONENT"` (service, default) or `"TEAM"`. Set to `"TEAM"` when the owner is a team.
- `value` (String) The value of the custom property (must be a valid JSON value or null).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `locked` (Boolean) If locked = true, the property has been set in opslevel.yml and cannot be modified in Terraform!

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax. The owner can be a **service** or **team** id/alias.

```shell
terraform import opslevel_property_assignment.example Z2lkOi8vb3BzbGV2ZWwvU2VydmljZS85MTQyOQ:Z2lkOi8vb3BzbGV2ZWwvUHJvcGVydGllczo6RGVmaW5pdGlvbi8xODA
# Or with team alias:
# terraform import opslevel_property_assignment.example my-team-alias:definition-alias
```
